title: lolium rigidum subsp. lepturoides
intro: Lolium rigidum subsp. lepturoides, also known as annual ryegrass, is a weed plant species that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antifungal activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing oxidative stress and improving immune function, and has been used to treat conditions like fever and skin infections. Lolium rigidum subsp. lepturoides can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional herbal remedies.
